overview: A premium, conversion-focused real estate website for KOTA RENTAL & PROPERTIES — Kota's most trusted rental and property consultancy for students, parents, families, and working professionals. Features verified property listings, interactive search and filters, WhatsApp lead capture, local area expertise, and a high-trust glassmorphism design built to convert visitors into inquiries.
features: Sticky glassmorphism navbar with scroll-shrink effect
Hero section with animated property cards and trust badges
Featured property cards with hover animations and WhatsApp CTAs
Why Choose Us trust section with 6 feature cards
Local authority section covering key Kota areas and coaching hotspots
Auto-scrolling testimonials carousel with glassmorphism cards
Floating WhatsApp button and sticky mobile CTA bar
Premium footer with contact info, service areas, and Google Maps link
Mobile-first responsive design optimized for lead conversion
